reasoning: The base rate for a President being removed or stripped of powers under Section 4 of the 25th Amendment is 0%. The process requires the Vice President (JD Vance) and a majority of the Cabinet to initiate the action. If the President contests it, a two-thirds vote in both the House and the Senate is required. Calls for invoking the 25th Amendment are currently coming exclusively from Democratic opposition figures (e.g., Maxine Waters, Governor J.B. Pritzker) due to controversial actions/statements by Trump, but there is absolutely no indication that Vance or Trump's appointed Cabinet would turn on him. Even with the unprecedented events of January 6, 2021, the 25th Amendment was not invoked. Furthermore, there are only about two months remaining between the October 26, 2025 knowledge cutoff and the December 31, 2025 resolution date, providing virtually no time for such an unlikely sequence of events to unfold. A 2% probability realistically reflects the practically nonexistent chance of this occurring while acknowledging the "never say never" rule of forecasting.
